overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade in Night City. The player moves through covered walkways with distinctive orange arches, past neon-lit stalls and digital billboards, while fog obscures the towering skyscrapers in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with glass and steel canopy

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza beneath the curved glass roof, passing pedestrians on both sides

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking left to right across the path
pedestrian in colorful outfit ascending the concrete stairs

entered.detail: large curved structure with glass panels and orange support arches forming a canopy over the walkway
repeating curved orange metal beams supporting the glass roof overhead
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on the building facade
tall palm tree visible through the glass canopy against the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a curved glass and steel canopy in a futuristic waterfront plaza. The player walks forward on wet tiled pavement reflecting the ambient light, passing scattered pedestrians. Orange structural arches dominate the architecture while digital billboards glow in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront observation deck with ocean view

events.description: exits the covered glass canopy into the open waterfront area exposed to rain and fog

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade as the roof ends, approaching the waterfront railing

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing and conversing near the waterfront railing

entered.detail: metal safety railing marking the edge of the promenade overlooking the water
overcast foggy sky visible overhead as the canopy ends

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the sheltered canopy into the open waterfront area. The curved glass building falls behind as the scene opens to the foggy sky and waterfront railing. Palm trees line the path and a small group of pedestrians gather near the railing overlooking the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with view of mega-skyscraper complex

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal a massive skyscraper disappearing into the fog above

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront while looking up at the towering architecture and observing the surroundings

entered.detail: colossal dark skyscraper with multiple connecting bridges and floating platforms, upper floors obscured by fog
circular structures attached to the main tower with glowing windows and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the open promenade with the waterfront railing now to the left. The camera pans upward to reveal a massive skyscraper complex with floating platforms and connecting bridges, its upper levels lost in the fog. The orange arch structures reappear on the right as the path curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with neon-lit food stalls and outdoor seating

events.description: passing by a brightly lit neon purple bar stand casting colored reflections on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking past the glowing food stands and outdoor seating areas under the returning canopy

notable_agents.action: vendor or bartender standing behind the neon-lit counter

entered.detail: outdoor bar counter illuminated with bright purple neon lights and circular menu displays
tables and chairs arranged under large umbrellas near the food stalls

segments.scene_description: The player returns to the covered walkway section, passing under the orange arches again. A vibrant neon-lit food stand with purple illumination stands out on the left, casting colorful reflections on the wet ground. The massive skyscraper disappears from view behind the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront path with sparse kiosks and planters

agents.ego_description: continuing along the quiet waterfront path with fewer pedestrians and minimal structures

entered.detail: small green-roofed vendor booth with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a quieter stretch of the waterfront promenade. The orange arches and neon stands have passed behind, leaving an open path with the waterfront railing visible ahead. The area is nearly empty of pedestrians, with only a small kiosk and some planters breaking up the wet tiled surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a rainy waterfront promenade that shifts from sheltered architectural corridors to an open, foggy vista before returning to neon-lit walkways. It begins under a curved glass and steel canopy where orange structural arches frame a wet tiled plaza reflecting the glow of digital billboards. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a misty waterfront area lined with palm trees and pedestrians gathered by a railing. The view then expands upward to reveal a massive skyscraper complex with floating platforms lost in the fog before the path curves back under the orange arches, passing a vibrant purple neon food stand. Finally, the environment transitions into a quieter, open stretch of the promenade where the neon lights fade, leaving only a solitary kiosk and planters along the damp pavement.
